quests.name: Air Drop
quests.requirements:
Kill a Deathsquito with a thrown Spear
📸 Deathsquito while holding a Spear
📸 Kiling Deathsquito, no longer holding Spear

quests.name: Cold Shot
quests.requirements:
Kill a Drake with a Spear with a thrown Spear
📸 Drake while holding a Spear
📸 Kiling Drake, no longer holding Spear

quests.name: Crow's Nest
quests.requirements:
Jump atop the mast of one of the Drakkars at the Slayer HQ
📸 View of HQ from your perch

quests.name: Dodge a Wrench
quests.requirements:
Play a game of Harpoon Ball - staff-hosted Slayer PvP event
🔗 Event summary posted in #Slayer Announcements

quests.name: Master Killer
quests.requirements:
Prove you cleared the Mistlands and Ashlands
📸 Turn in: 1 stack each of Seeker Meat, Scale Hide, Charred Bones, Bonemaw Tooth

quests.name: Misty Meat
quests.requirements:
Drag a Serpent onto land and dispose of it
📸 Dragging the Serpent on land
📸 Killing Serpent

quests.name: Rare Killer
quests.requirements:
Kill the rare enemies and make their heads roll
📸 Turn in or mount in your quarters: 1 each of Fallen Valkyrie, Rancid Remains, and Wraith Trophies

quests.name: Hard and Wild
quests.requirements:
Trap 2 wild Boars: one must be 1+ star. Start the taming process and display a sign: "Free Boars from the Slayers"
📸 Wild, fenced, starred Boar with status: 1-99% tame

quests.name: Fenrir's Children
quests.requirements:
Trap 2 wild Wolves: one must be 1+ star. Start the taming process and display a sign: "Free Wolves from the Slayers"
📸 Wild, fenced, starred Wolf with status: 1-99% tame

quests.name: Can I Pick Your Brain 1
quests.requirements:
Stagger a Troll by shooting it in the head for extra damage
📸 A staggered Troll with a damage number near its head, your bow or crossbow equipped
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Can I Pick Your Brain 1 image:

quests.name: Can I Pick Your Brain 2
quests.requirements:
Jump on a Stone Golem's head and hit it with your Pickaxe
📸 Swinging your Pickaxe on top of a Stone Golem
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Can I Pick Your Brain 2 image:

quests.name: Can I Pick Your Brain 3
quests.requirements:
Land the killing blow on a Gjall with a thrown Spear
📸 Holding a Spear and looking at Gjall
📸 Gjallsplosion! (spear thrown)
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Can I Pick Your Brain 3 image: image2:

quests.name: Can I Pick Your Brain 4
quests.requirements:
Lure a Seeker Soldier into smashing a Jotunn Skull for you
📸 Seeker Soldier next to a Skull with a hole in it
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Can I Pick Your Brain 4 image:

quests.name: Legendary Lobotomizer
quests.requirements: Complete all 4 Can I Pick Your Brain summons (above)

quests.name: Too Hot for You 1
quests.requirements:
Kill an enemy in any Dungeon by building a fire under it and walling it off with cooking racks. Deconstruct when done!
📸 Burning enemy with campfire and cooking racks visible
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Too Hot for You 1 image:

quests.name: Too Hot For You 2
quests.requirements:
Parry an Abomination over the flame of a Surtling spawner
📸 Abomination staggered and on fire
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Too Hot for You 2 image:

quests.name: Too Hot For You 3
quests.requirements:
Lure an enemy into Ashlands waters and watch it boil alive
📸 Enemy losing HP while over boiling water
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Too Hot for You 3 image:

quests.name: Too Hot for You 4
quests.requirements:
Dodge roll a lava blob explosion
📸 You *not* on fire with lava blob explosion effects all around
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Too Hot for You 4 image:

quests.name: Legendary Cook
quests.requirements: Complete all 4 Too Hot for You summons (above)

quests.name: Deer Destroyer
quests.requirements:
In a group of 2-4: Defeat Eikthyr completely unarmed: only fists
📸 Group fighting Eikthyr barehanded - no solo!
🤜🤛 Tag all players - they will get credit too

quests.name: Elder Extinguisher
quests.requirements:
In a group of 2-4: Defeat Elder by swinging Torches at it
📸 Group fighting Elder with Torches - no solo!
🤜🤛 Tag all players - they will get credit too

quests.name: Bonkin Bonemass
quests.requirements:
In a group of 2-4: Defeat Bonemass with only wooden Clubs
📸 Group fighting Bonemass with Clubs - no solo!
🤜🤛 Tag all players - they will get credit too

quests.name: Melee Moder
quests.requirements: 📸 Defeat Moder with melee weapons only - solo or group fight, but all players submit separately

quests.name: Got Your Back
quests.requirements:
Run behind Yagluth's tailbone and kite him around to prevent him attacking - solo or group fight, but all players submit separately
📸 You behind Yagluth while he does no attack animations

quests.name: Game of Thrones
quests.requirements:
Defeat The Queen with Frost or Fire weapons/arrows - solo or group fight, but all players submit separately
📸 You fighting The Queen with Frost or Fire weapons (no magic)

quests.name: Friendly Fissure
quests.requirements:
Lure a Fallen Valkyrie or Morgen into Fader's Fissure (ground spikes) attack and watch it burn to death
📸 Fallen Valkyrie or Morgen burning in Fader's green flames

quests.name: Legendary Boss Rusher
quests.requirements: Complete all 7 Forsaken-related Boss Rush summons (above)

quests.name: Ancient Berserker Weapon
quests.requirements:
Find a Berserker weapon site and defeat the elite enemy within
📸 Fighting the enemy
📸 Reading the text on the Runestone
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Ancient Berserker Weapon image: image2:

quests.name: Arsenal of a Berserker
quests.requirements:
On an armor stand in your quarters, permanently mount your:
📸 Berserker armor (Carapace set) and
📸 Dual-wielded weapons
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Arsenal of a Berserker image: image2:

quests.name: Build: Dedication
quests.requirements:
Build a huge, statue-sized viking weapon, at least 6m tall.
Could be turned into a Slayer Ancient Weapon Site!
📸x4 of your Build
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Build: Dedication image: image2: image3: image4:

quests.name: Burning Man
quests.requirements:
Fight a horde of 5+ Ashlands enemies including:
📸 A Morgen or a Fallen Valkyrie, and
📸 Win, showing their drops

quests.name: Burnt Bonemaw
quests.requirements:
Drag a Bonemaw into the Ashlands Lava and kill it - can co-op
🤜🤛 Tag another player to credit both of you
📸 You both killing the Bonemaw over lava

quests.name: Coup de Grace
quests.requirements:
Jump out of your boat in the Ocean and
📸  Kill a Serpent before you splash land, to get the
📸 (show inventory) Serpent Scales before they sink!
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Coup de Grace image: image2:

quests.name: Exterminator
quests.requirements:
Find and destroy the Mini-Bosses of Valheim:
📸 Turn in or mount in your quarters: 1 each of Brenna, Geirrhafa, Zil, Thungr Trophies

quests.name: Fort Night
quests.requirements:
Taking another player to a Charred Fortress you found, and as a
🔗 Protection Contract, help them clear it. Take no loot as always.
📸 You both clearing the fortress

quests.name: God of Thunder
quests.requirements:
Using a gemmed weapon, trigger a massive chain lightning proc!
📸 5+ enemies getting zapped

quests.name: Helldiver
quests.requirements:
Use a catapult to
📸 (Superman pose) launch yourself into a Charred Fortress and
📸 (empty fortress) eliminate all enemies within!

quests.name: Helldiver Legendary
quests.requirements:
Do Helldiver totally naked: No feather cape, no magic
Deaths are expected, Helldivers are expendable!

quests.name: Iron Price
quests.requirements:
📸 Fight another player to the death over a weapon - describe what weapon was worth your lives! Follow boosting rules!
🤜🤛 Tag your opponent - you both receive credit
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Iron Price image: participants: summons_notes:

quests.name: Raging
quests.requirements:
Prove your strength. 📸 Kill a Seeker Soldier while naked and using dual-wielded weapons
📸 Survive, showing its drops

quests.name: This is SPARTA
quests.requirements: Using Flesh Rippers, 📸 kick an enemy 📸 into a mountain well!
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:This is SPARTA image: image2:

quests.name: Trial by Fire
quests.requirements:
In the Slayer event, Trial By Fire: Defeat the Fuling Berserker
📸 Show drops

quests.name: Trial by Fire Legendary
quests.requirements:
In the Slayer event, Trial By Fire: Defeat Lord Reto
📸 Show drops
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Trial by Fire Legendary image:

quests.name: Who Seeks the Seekers
quests.requirements:
Using Dual-wielded or Lightning weapons,
📸 Fight through an Infested Mine with multiple Seeker Soldiers
🔗 Post coordinates @Slayers to help others get Soldier Trophies
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Who Seeks the Seekers image: summons_url:

quests.name: Wicked Purge
quests.requirements: Using Dual-wielded or Lightning weapons 📸 kill everything at a Fuling Camp and 📸 show the ruins left in your wake

quests.name: Berserker Event
quests.requirements:
Rip and tear, until it is done.
📸 All gear from event placed in obliterator
📸 What's left in the obliterator after pulling the lever

quests.name: Ancient Brute Weapon
quests.requirements:
Find a Brute weapon site and defeat the elite enemy within
📸 Fighting the enemy
📸 Reading the text on the Runestone
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Ancient Brute Weapon image: image2:

quests.name: Arsenal of a Brute
quests.requirements:
On an armor stand in your quarters, permanently mount your:
📸 Brute armor (Padded set) and
📸 Two-handed weapon
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Arsenal of a Brute image: image2:

quests.name: Build: Fight Club
quests.requirements:
Build a battle arena for you and your friends.
Could be turned into a Slayer PvP Event!
📸x4 of your Build
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Dedication image: image2: image3: image4:

quests.name: Banger
quests.requirements: Jump on a Gjall and 📸 beat its brains with a Two-handed Hammer!

quests.name: Bloodborne
quests.requirements: Transport 📸 four Ticks to your Slayer Quarters! Starred ticks count as two!

quests.name: Bloody Blade
quests.requirements:
With a Brutal Slayer two-handed sword,
📸 Fight a Seeker Soldier while missing more than half your HP
📸 Then kill it! - show drops

quests.name: Blood soaked
quests.requirements:
With a Bloodstone-enhanced or a two-handed weapon,
📸 Find two Morgens together...
📸 and kill them at the same time! - show drops

quests.name: Cattle Prod
quests.requirements: 📸 Hit 3 Lox at once with a Himminafl secondary (spin attack)

quests.name: Flawless Victory
quests.requirements:
Participate in a staff-hosted Eichenwalde PvP event
(Not the Creator version)
🔗 Link summary post from #Slayers

quests.name: Flawless Victory Legendary
quests.requirements:
At a staff-hosted Eichenwalde PvP event,
📸 Kill multiple opponents with one Earthshatter (single-use Demolisher with that tag)

quests.name: Golem Executioner
quests.requirements:
📸 Wield a two-handed sledgehammer facing two Stone Golems
📸 and reduce them both to rubble

quests.name: Hold my Mead
quests.requirements:
Jump off a high point in the Mistlands or Ashlands, taking 
📸 Severe fall damage (over 50). With a blood-enhanced weapon, 📸 Kill an enemy in one blow.
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Hold my Mead image: image2:

quests.name: Homewrecker
quests.requirements:
📸 Demolish a Dvergr Tower with a sledgehammer and
📸 Stash away the drops nearby, off-site (don't block Regen!) in chests with a sign: "Free Dvergr mats from the Slayers."

quests.name: Kilo Strike
quests.requirements:
Do over 1000 damage in a single strike!
📸 Damage number over 1000 - see how high you can hit!

quests.name: Kilo Strike Legendary
quests.requirements: Reach over 📸 2500 damage in a single strike!
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Kilo Strike Legendary image: image2:

quests.name: Rude Awakening
quests.requirements: 📸 Backstab (surprise attack) a Forsaken Boss as it spawns, by performing a two-handed sword secondary (big stab)

quests.name: Supreme King
quests.requirements:
Using only the Brutal Slayer or Krom and no magic,
📸 Kill The Queen in a solo battle
📸 Show drops

quests.name: Warrior's Tale
quests.requirements:
Return to the site of a major battle you once had, and 
📸 Write a story about it on signs built next to a campfire and chair

quests.name: Brute Event
quests.requirements:
Kill everything that moves!
📸 All gear from event placed in obliterator
📸 What's left in the obliterator after pulling the lever

quests.requirements:
Find a Knight weapon site and defeat the elite enemy within

quests.name: Arsenal of a Knight
quests.requirements:
On an armor stand in your quarters, permanently mount your:
📸 Knight armor (Silver, Iron, or Bronze set) and
📸 One-handed weapon and shield

quests.name: Build: Training Grounds
quests.requirements:
Build a Training area where players can level their skills.

📸x4 of your Build
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Dedication image: image2: image3: image4:

quests.name: Can't Touch This
quests.requirements:
Block or parry over 200 damage from one incoming blow!
No magic bubbles, must be a physical shield or weapon
📸 Show damage text: Blocked 200+

quests.name: Challenger
quests.requirements: Complete 10 Protection Contracts

quests.name: Diplomat
quests.requirements:
Provide Slayer Protection for a Guild-related event or activity
🔗 Thank-you post or approved bounty

quests.name: Dragon Rider
quests.requirements:
📸 Stand atop a flying Drake
Also counts for the Daring Drifter Explorer Adventure

quests.name: Dragon Rider Legendary
quests.requirements: 📸 Stand on Moder's back while she is flying!

quests.name: Float Like a Butterfly
quests.requirements:
Without using protection magic or Anti-Sting potions:
📸 Stare down a Deathsquito completely naked and unarmed
📸 and kill it with your bare hands - show drops
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Float Like a Butterfly image: image2:

quests.name: Float Like a Butterfly Legendary
quests.requirements: Do Float Like a Butterfly with no food at all!
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Float Like a Butterfly Legendary image: image2:

quests.name: Gold Price
quests.requirements:
Earn at least 10 of these Merchant Tokens:
Armorer, Bedazzled, Blacksmith, Rootin' Tootin' and Shootin'
🔗 Your approved tokens using /merchant count

quests.name: Knight of Odin
quests.requirements:
Complete a set of 6 Creator Capes and redeem your Odin Cape!
📸 Show off its tag

quests.name: Parry Master
quests.requirements:
Complete the Parry Hunting Grounds event
📸 Show the aftermath of the final fight

quests.name: Realm Protector
quests.requirements: 📸 Turn in or mount the heads of all 7 Forsaken Bosses.

quests.name: Standard-bearer
quests.requirements:
Participate in a staff-hosted Capture the Flag event
🔗 Link summary post from #Slayers

quests.name: Silver Tempest
quests.requirements:
The Knights need upgraded equipment to fend off the undead.
Craft a Silver Sword and Shield and
📸 Turn in or mount them in your quarters

quests.name: Veteran
quests.requirements:
Run two Combat Creator Events with a non-basemate player who hasn't already completed it this era
🔗🔗 Thank-you posts mentioning who the first-timers are

quests.name: Witch Hunter
quests.requirements:
Burn a Fuling Shaman to death by 
📸 dragging it into the Bonfire at a Fuling camp

quests.name: Knight Event
quests.requirements:
Find out what happened to Geirrhafa.
📸 All gear from event placed in obliterator
📸 What's left in the obliterator after pulling the lever

quests.requirements:
Find a Rogue weapon site and defeat the elite enemy within

📸 Reading the text on the Runestone

quests.name: Arsenal of a Rogue
quests.requirements:
On an armor stand in your quarters, permanently mount your:
📸 Rogue armor (Root, Fenris, or Ask set) and
📸 Bow, Crossbow, or Knife
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Arsenal of a Rogue image: image2:

quests.name: Build: Shrine of Smoke
quests.requirements:
Build a shrine to a Slayer you wish to honor and write a story about their deeds on signs.
📸x4 of your Build
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Dedication image: image2: image3: image4:

quests.name: Airshot
quests.requirements:
Kill a Blob mid-jump
📸 Blobsplosion in the air!

quests.name: Air Superiority
quests.requirements:
Jump off a 📸 high place with a feather cape and
📸 Shoot a flying enemy in midair

quests.name: Air Superiority Legendary
quests.requirements:
Instead of jumping, use a catapult to
📸 launch yourself into the sky and
📸 shoot a flying enemy while flying (Superman-posed) in midair
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Air Superiority Legendary image: image2:

quests.name: Back Stabber
quests.requirements: Befriend a Dvergr - 📸 dance with them - and then 📸 kill them with a knife

quests.name: Bird of Prey
quests.requirements: 📸 Kill a Volture from a great distance in one shot

quests.name: Bomb Voyage
quests.requirements:
Throw down a basalt bomb at your feet in the Ashlands lava to temporarily escape from enemies
📸 Taunt them while you're out of reach

quests.name: Clash of Titans
quests.requirements:
Find out whose strength is greatest: Get a 1v1 fight going between a Troll, Abomination, Golem, or Lox
📸 Show the spectacle and note who won
quests.bot_command: /slayer summons summons_type:Clash of Titans image: summons_notes:

quests.name: Death from Above
quests.requirements:
Eliminate the flying threats spawncamping your fellow Vikings:
📸 Turn in or mount in your quarters: 1 each of Volture, Gjall, and Deathsquito Trophies

quests.name: Full House
quests.requirements: 📸 Turn in a complete Charred skeleton: 1 each of Warrior, Warlock, and Marksman Trophies

quests.name: Gjallarhorn Come
quests.requirements:
Lure a Gjall into a different biome and
📸 Watch it set your enemies aflame

quests.name: Redeemer
quests.requirements:
With only a bow and knife eliminate a fallen Valkeryie over the flames of the Ashlands
📸 Screenshot of their death by weapon or short video

quests.name: Raid Shadow Legends
quests.requirements:
📸 Complete the Mysterious Mist in a group (no soloing)
🤜🤛 Tag all participants - everyone gets credit

quests.name: Silent Killer
quests.requirements: 📸 Sneak up behind a Troll

quests.requirements:
📸 Sneak up behind a 📸 starred Troll and, with a knife, 
📸 Kill it in one blow

quests.requirements:
Participate in Tower Defense staff-hosted event

quests.requirements:
